rulings.Case Title: IN THE MATTER OF THE CHOY MAE WONG WONG TRUST
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion And Motion For Protective Order; Memorandum Of Points And Authorities; Decleration In Support Thereof
rulings.Rulings: ON CALENDAR FOR FRIDAY, DECEMBER 1, 2006, Petitioner Lili Silvera, Lorraine Lee, Wyman Lew, Catherine Lew's Motion For Protective Order is denied as it seeks to exclude Pearl Wong from the deposition of Lawrence Wong. However, the court does order that the deposition be noticed to take place in the Discovery Department courtroom on dates to be arranged with the clerk of the Discovery Department. Respondents' request for sanctions is denied. = (612/EAH)
